title: pulicaria glaucescens
intro: Pulicaria glaucescens, also known as Marsh Fleabane or Common Fleabane, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in wetlands and grasslands. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pulicaria glaucescens include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pulicaria glaucescens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
